description_long: This is a black snapback cap featuring a structured, flat brim and a rounded crown. The front panel displays a bold orange logo with the text 'BAM BAM' in a stylized, stacked font. The cap has a fabric-covered button at the top and visible stitched eyelets for ventilation. The back of the cap includes an adjustable strap with a plastic buckle, allowing for a customizable fit. The overall construction appears to be made from a durable, woven fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, with reinforced stitching along the seams. The design is modern and urban, suitable for casual streetwear.
description: A black snapback cap with a flat brim and an orange 'BAM BAM' logo on the front, featuring an adjustable strap at the back.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the adjustable strap and opening at the back of the cap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat brim and the edge of the orange logo on the front panel.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full 'BAM BAM' orange logo and the structured, flat brim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the clean, uninterrupted black fabric and the brim's profile.
